transcript.clean_text: Stage five of the tour of Imam the Queen stage taking the riders from Samael to Jebel Akhdar the Green Mountain the group of riders escaping early after seven kilometres of racing two riders from direct energy in the mix Roman cardis and Fabian girelli a Astana in the turquoise on the front of the peloton looking after the interests all day of Alexey Lutsenko along the route to schools coming out to cheer on the riders a prolific pace a lot of tailwind sections and crosswinds also to contend with ahead the leading group continuing with their advantage direct energy trying to outwit the peloton and take the race all the way to the top of the mountain onto the climb and riders starting to be dropped have the peloton left it too late ahead Fabian gray Lee a going for glory braylee a starting the slopes of the Green Mountain on this rise Chris Froome Vincenzo Nibali have both been victors Lysenko started to set the tempo so did happen at a puma looking after the interests of had a de Grail ei continued with his effort at a puma his work done left Gerardo to go it again spots of Evo and the man in the red jersey with Senko but severe Oh the Italian trying desperately to close the gap one kilometer to go when the race was on Grell EA in the lead for 144 kilometers his legs gave out with literally 100 meters to go to the finish Lysenko captured the stage another victory for the man from Astana three stage victories now a red jersey to take to mattre corniche as the winner of the Tour of Oman seven seconds ahead of Braille ei on the line this man will wear the jersey tomorrow
